chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No. 1708 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application. 04-11-2022 M/s. Fayyaz Ali Metlo, Athar Hussain and Ayub Channa, Advocates holds brief for Mr. Sarfraz Ali Metlo, Advocate a/w applicant. Mr. Wazeer Hussain Khoso, Advocate for complainant. Ms. Robina Qadir, DPG. ============= Omar Sial, J.: Ashok Kumar has sought pre-arrest bail in crime number 266 of 2022 registered under section 420 and 34 P.P.C at the Clifton police station. Earlier, his application seeking bail was dismissed on 31.08.2022 by the learned 11th Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi South on 31.08.2022. 2. There is no need to go into much detail in this application as it is an admitted position that an offence under section 420 P.P.C. is a bailable offence. It appears that the learned trial judge was not assisted properly in this regard. 3. Above are the reasons for my having confirmed the interim pre-arrest bail of the applicant on the same terms and conditions through a short order dated 01.11.2022. JUDGE
